{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forged glowing fangs
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Forged glowing fangs]] are attacking a barrier of blue-white madra.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
